title: Just Stone
description: Transforms the overworld into a cave only world
body:
This worldgen datapack transforms the overworld into an underground, only caves generate and there is a bedrock ceiling

Generates blocks up to height 192 instead of the actual 384 height to improve performance

Should work with any cave biome mod as long as it doesn't touch the noise settings

Structures may still generate above the bedrock ceiling

**Does not work with terrablender**, the bedrock ceiling won't generate
